english.headline: Bloody Nose, Big Heart: Alek Powers the Win
english.commentator: Alek is loving every minute of this — and so is every Hammond Park fan watching on! Hammond Park ran out winners against South Coogee and number 13 was right in the thick of it — two goals early kept the team fighting and gave everyone the belief to go on with it. That one's going on the highlight reel — straight through from number 13, and Hammond Park love it! And then, in the fourth quarter, Alek took a knock and left the field — only to come back on with a bloody nose and keep playing for his team. That's the stuff champions are made of. A brand new personal best of 14 points — can't wait to see what you bring next week, number 13!
